# Third-Party RAG Systems

This section is for external retrieval-augmented generation systems that are
included directly in AI-for-Physics.

Each copied project should preserve upstream license files and include local
import notes recording the source URL, upstream commit, license, copyright
holder, and any local modifications.

## Local Sources

| Path | Purpose |
| --- | --- |
| [`cyber-witten/`](cyber-witten/) | MIT-licensed RAG codebase for grounded question-answering over Edward Witten's papers. |
